products.name: Landing & Arresting Gear
products.descriptor: Custom-engineered landing and arresting gear shock absorbers for UAVs, eVTOL, and aircraft

evidence.snippet:
##### Landing Gear
Lighter, More Compact, Maintenance Free Landing Gear

Landing Gear for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs)
------------------------------------------------

products.name: Pumpkin™ Mounts
products.descriptor: Patent-protected shock and vibration isolator for military and naval environments, up to 1600 kg per mount

evidence.snippet: The PUMPKIN™ Mount is a shock and vibration isolator manufactured by Taylor Devices, Inc. This patent-protected mount design has been successfully shock tested in naval environments where explosive shock standards are extremely rigorous, reducing input accelerations of several hundred g down to an average of 15g or less.

PUMPKIN™ Mounts are designed for use in military applications including protection against underwater shock (UNDEX) events. They can also be used for various civil engineering, industrial, and transportation applications particularly when 6 degree-of-freedom protection is required.

products.name: Custom Actuators
products.descriptor: Custom-designed linear actuators for aerospace, military, space, and high-vacuum applications

evidence.snippet:
Custom Actuators
----------------
Actuators provide motion to any machine or system by converting energy into mechanical force. Taylor Devices can develop custom linear actuators that are activated by a machined spring, conventional coil spring, gas spring, liquid spring or externally applied system pressure.

*   Qualified for land, air, sea or space applications
*   Missile launch systems
*   Jets
*   Space Antennas

products.name: Isolation Systems
products.descriptor: Custom-engineered shock and vibration isolation systems for space, defense, nuclear, and structural applications

evidence.snippet:
##### Isolation Systems
Vibration Isolation Systems That Can Protect Your Equipment

Most shock and vibration isolation systems consist of a combination of suspension elements (i.e. coil/machined springs or PUMPKIN Mounts™), including an optimized level of damping. Isolation systems are designed to operate along any desired plane or axis of rotation, up to 6 degrees of freedom.

products.name: M-Series Standard Fluidicshok
products.descriptor: Compact stainless-steel industrial shock absorber, 170–5,600 in-lb capacity, with coil spring reset

evidence.snippet:
M-Series Standard Fluidicshok
![](https://taylordevices.wpengine.com/wp-content/uploads/M-Series-Website-e1570640918495-300x87.png)
1.  The most compact and light weight shock available anywhere for applications as demanding as aerospace, at competitive commercial prices. Available in four sizes, 170 in-lbs. to 5,600 in-lbs. capacity. Velocity ranges of 10 to 150 in/sec.

products.name: H-Series Standard Fluidicshok
products.descriptor: Heavy-duty enclosed-rod industrial shock absorber with liquid spring reset and wide temperature range

evidence.snippet:
H-Series Standard Fluidicshok
![](https://taylordevices.wpengine.com/wp-content/uploads/H-Series-Website.png)
**Includes all the features of the M-SERIES standard Fluidicshok®, plus the following heavy duty equipment:**
1.  Piston rod is totally enclosed and protected by a steel guide sleeve. This allows operation in adverse environments or where sideload or bending loads are imposed on the shock. Guide sleeve is corrosion protected steel.

5.  Optional velocity range of 10 in/sec. to 400 in/sec.
[Dimensions](/custom/pdf/brochures/H_Series.pdf)

products.name: W-Series Self Adjusting Fluidicshok
products.descriptor: Self-adjusting industrial shock absorber in four sizes, up to 19,000 in-lb capacity, maintenance-free

evidence.snippet:
W-Series Self Adjusting Fluidicshok
![W-Series Shock Absorber](https://www.taylordevices.com/wp-content/uploads/W-Series-Website.png)
1.  Typical uses include machinery, automated equipment, conveyors, and aerospace.
2.  No maintenance, refilling, or adjusting required. The Fluidicshok® will automatically adjust its force and stroke to absorb any impact within its capacity diagram, even if weights and speeds change with

6.  Normal operating temperature range is -20 degrees F to + 140 degrees F continuous duty.
[Dimensions & Capacity Diagram](/custom/pdf/brochures/WSeries.pdf)

products.name: Uni-Shok Self Adjusting Fluidicshok

evidence.snippet:
Uni-Shock Self Adjusting Fluidicshok

1.  Available in 6 different sizes from 100 in-lbs. to 5000 in-lbs. capacity. Temperature range is -20 degrees F to +140 degrees F.

products.descriptor: Monotube hydraulic linear damper for high-speed machinery and robotic applications, up to 2,000 lb output

evidence.snippet:
D-Series Linear Dampers
D-Series Linear Dampers

products.name: Metal Bellows Dampers
products.descriptor: Hermetically sealed zero-leakage fluid dampers with infinite life, for space and structural applications

evidence.snippet: Taylor Devices has created a damper that has absolute zero leakage due to hermetically sealed construction making it ideal for both structural and space applications.

*   **Infinite Life –** The only damper design in the world that is designed for infinite life. Parts are stressed below the material fatigue endurance limit ensuring that the dampers will survive billions of cycles.
*   **Virtually Zero Friction –** There is no source of friction typical of standard elastomeric seals.

products.name: Fluid Viscous Dampers
products.descriptor: Velocity-dependent fluid viscous dampers for seismic and wind protection of structures, up to 2M lb force

evidence.snippet: Fluid viscous dampers (FVDs) are used to dissipate energy in a structure caused by seismic and wind events. FVDs can increase structural damping, typically between 15% and 35% in seismic applications, which significantly reduces drifts and stresses in a structure.

*   Force capacities from 55 to 1800 kips.
*   Stroke capacities up to ±42”
*   35-year warranty

products.name: Machined Springs
products.descriptor: High-precision machined metal springs for aerospace, military, and space applications with infinite cycle life

evidence.snippet: Machined springs offer high precision, lightweight, tension/compression operation, linearity, long life, and repeat-ability – with a selection of metal alloys limited only by the imagination.
*   **Wide Variety of Materials Available –** Machined springs can be made from a variety of materials such as high strength steel, stainless steel, aluminum, titanium, and high strength plastics.

products.name: Lock Up Devices
products.descriptor: Hydraulic shock transmission units that lock structures together during seismic or wind transients, 1–2,000 tons

evidence.snippet: Lock-Up Device designs are extremely simple, and available sizes range from 1 ton to 2,000 tons of force, and displacements up to plus or minus 60 inches.

products.name: Crane Buffers
products.descriptor: Hydraulic industrial crane buffers absorbing overhead crane impacts, over 60 standard sizes up to 100M in-lb

evidence.snippet:
Heavy Duty Industrial Hydraulic Crane Buffers
=============================================

These large Fluidicshok type buffers and coil spring reset with capacities of up to 11,000,000 inch-pounds are available in a heavy-duty mill-type design. Over 60 sizes are standard. Long stroke buffers are available with up to 120-inch deflections and capacities to one hundred million inch-pounds, making this the highest capacity standard shock absorber in the world.

products.name: Liquid Die Springs
products.descriptor: Hydraulic liquid die springs using compressed Tayco Piezoil fluid, rated to 20,000 PSI

evidence.snippet:
======================================
Our liquid die springs operate by mechanically compressing a liquid, Tayco Piezoil, in a sealed chamber. A piston moves into a cylinder filled with this liquid to compress it 9.4% at 20,000 PSI. The effect is roughly comparable to forcing 10 gallons of liquid into a 9-gallon container.
[Specifications & Dimensions](/custom/pdf/brochures/Taylor_LiquidDieSpringSpecs.pdf)

unresolved_questions: The Shock Absorbers product page (resource-0006) presents M-Series, H-Series, W-Series, Uni-Shok, and D-Series as sub-products under one URL; the prioritized list treats them as separate entries, which is reflected in the catalog. No NDAA or Blue UAS claims were found on any product page or the compliance/QA page — certifications are limited to AS9100, ISO 9001, and ISO 14001.
